examples: We have a vast expanse of cultivable land.
So awareness is something that is not cultivable.
This has provided valuable data for extension of cultivable land.
On some estimates, an area of cultivable land the size of France, Germany, Italy and Britain combined will be ruined.
The pressure of a desperately poor and growing population has led to the indiscriminate felling of trees, for fuel as well as to increase cultivable acreage.
